name: Nathan Milstein
abstract: Nathan Mironovich Milstein (Russian: Натан Миронович Мильштейн, romanized: Natan Mironovich Milshteyn; January 13, 1904 [O.S. December 31, 1903] – December 21, 1992) was a Russian-American virtuoso violinist.

about_quotes.speaker: Rudy Mazzari
about_quotes.evidence: one person I liked as a soloist, a famous musician, was Nathan Milstein. I liked him. He was a real nice boy.
